nodes.name: Stripe Webhook — Subscription Events
nodes.notes: Receives Stripe webhook events: invoice.paid, invoice.payment_failed, customer.subscription.trial_will_end, customer.subscription.deleted

parameters.functionCode:
// Build invoice HTML for PDF generation const d = $input.first().json; const invoiceHtml = `
DocGen
AI-Powered Documentation Platform · IBM Bob Hackathon 2026
github.com/softcopyacq/docgen
INVOICE
#${d.invoiceNumber}
${d.isPaid ? '● PAID' : d.isFailed ? '⚠ PAYMENT FAILED' : '● ACTIVE'}
Bill To
${d.customerName}
${d.customerEmail}
Invoice Details
Date: ${d.invoiceDate}
Invoice #: ${d.invoiceNumber}
Subscription: ${d.subscriptionId}
DescriptionQtyUnit PriceAmount
${d.productName}
Monthly subscription · IBM Bob AI · ${d.planDocs === 9999 ? 'Unlimited' : d.planDocs} docs/month		 1 $${d.amount} ${d.currency} $${d.amount} ${d.currency}
Subtotal$${d.amount}
Tax (10%)$${d.tax}
Total$${d.total} ${d.currency}
${d.isTrialEnd ? 'Trial Ending Soon:' : d.isPaid ? 'Payment Confirmed:' : 'Payment Notice:'} ${d.isPaid ? `Payment of $${d.total} received successfully. Thank you for using DocGen!` : d.isFailed ? `Payment of $${d.total} failed. Please update your payment method at ${d.appUrl}` : d.isTrialEnd ? `Your 3-day free trial ends on ${d.trialEnd}. You will be charged $${d.total} unless cancelled.` : `Your subscription has been cancelled. No further charges will be applied.`}
DocGen · support@docgen.ai · ${d.appUrl} · github.com/softcopyacq/docgen
`; return [{ json: { ...d, invoiceHtml, invoiceReady: true } }];

parameters.subject: ✅ DocGen — Payment Confirmed · Invoice {{ $json.invoiceNumber }}
parameters.html:
DocGen
AI-Powered Documentation Platform

✅ Payment Confirmed!

Hi {{ $json.customerName }},

Thank you for your payment of ${{ $json.total }} {{ $json.currency }} for the DocGen {{ $json.planName }} Plan.

Invoice: {{ $json.invoiceNumber }}
Date: {{ $json.invoiceDate }}
Amount: ${{ $json.total }} {{ $json.currency }}
Subscription: {{ $json.subscriptionId }}
Open DocGen →

Questions? Reply to this email or visit {{ $json.appUrl }}

parameters.subject: ⚠️ DocGen — Payment Failed · Action Required
parameters.html:
DocGen

⚠️ Payment Failed

Hi {{ $json.customerName }},

We were unable to process your payment of ${{ $json.total }} {{ $json.currency }} for DocGen {{ $json.planName }}.

Please update your payment method to keep your DocGen access active.

Update Payment Method →

If you need help, reply to this email. Invoice ref: {{ $json.invoiceNumber }}

parameters.subject: ⏰ Your DocGen Free Trial Ends Tomorrow — {{ $json.trialEnd }}
parameters.html:
DocGen

⏰ Trial Ending Soon

Hi {{ $json.customerName }},

Your 3-day free trial ends on {{ $json.trialEnd }}. After that, your DocGen {{ $json.planName }} Plan will continue at ${{ $json.total }}/month.

No action needed if you want to keep your subscription. To cancel, visit your dashboard before the trial ends.

Manage Subscription →

meta.author: Newbon Kiroso
meta.description: DocGen subscription payment automation: Stripe webhooks → format data → route by event → HubSpot CRM → Invoice PDF → customer email → Slack finance team → Google Sheets MRR tracking
